𖤓Headcanons!𖤓

Long white hair and skin, right eye is red while the left one is green, they have 2 pairs or wings one small pair on their head and another slightly larger one on their waist. Sharp claws and teeth still, the tips of their fingers are black from corruption (yes I lied about non-corrupted), tail with short fur on it, it has feathers at the tip

Still intersex and is okay with any pronouns you use

Okay so similar to my usual backstory for her, she hacked to get Shed's attention but instead of banishing her he and the other admins decided on a different punishment. Socializing with people her age. Scary.

Shed retired from his position and now they live together in the city yada yada

Gosh thats long

Shedletsky is mentioned a lot + he has a briefly explanation for personality and apperance. He may show up or you can make him show up

Is it weird for me to enjoy high school AUs a lot? Maybe I just miss the old times, as painful as waking up so early was.

Anyways this is also me trying to figure out how bots with multiple characters work.

Also also, do you guys want me to use the pronoun thing? I personally don't plan on using them because most of my personas do not have specific pronouns, but I'd like to know your opinions as well
